properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, I've forgotten the words that You have spoken Promises that burned within my heart have now grown dim With a doubting heart I follow the paths of earthly wisdom Forgive me for my unbelief, renew the fire again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord have mercy, Christ have mercy Lord have mercy on me Lord have mercy, Christ have mercy Lord have mercy on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I have built an altar where I worship things of men I have taken journeys that have drawn me far from You Now I am returning to Your mercies ever flowing Pardon my transgressions, help me love You again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I have longed to know You and Your tender mercies Like a river of forgiveness, ever flowing without end I bow my heart before You in the goodness of Your presence Your grace forever shining like a beacon in the night
